description: Fixed a race condition on Unix/Linux where `aspire stop` would falsely report failure even when the AppHost stopped successfully. The root cause was the shutdown cascade through the launcher CLI — on Unix, SIGTERM is now sent directly to the AppHost PID so every process is reaped by its actual parent, eliminating the orphan/zombie scenario that caused ~40-second timeouts.
name: Fix `aspire stop` falsely reporting failure on Unix
